originalTitle: WERWULF - Official Trailer [HD] - Only In Theaters Christmas
content: Do not dread the darkness. Embrace it. Robert Eggers' WERWULF is only in theaters this Christmas. Witness Robert Eggers’ most visceral and haunting experience yet. Focus Features presents WERWULF, a harrowing tale of devotion, damnation and the devil within. https://werwulffilm.com/ Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/werwulfmovie/ Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/werwulfmovie Twitter: https://x.com/werwulfmovie Subscribe to Focus Features: http://bit.ly/FocusFeaturesYouTube Become a Focus Insider: https://insider.focusfeatures.com Website: https://www.focusfeatures.com Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/focusfeatures Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/focusfeatures Twitter: https://twitter.com/focusfeatures
chineseContent: 不要害怕黑暗。拥抱它。罗伯特·艾格斯的《WERWULF》仅在今年圣诞节上映。见证罗伯特·艾格斯迄今为止最发自内心、最令人难忘的经历。 Focus Features 呈现了《WERWULF》，这是一个关于奉献、诅咒和内心恶魔的悲惨故事。 https://werwulffilm.com/ Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/werwulfmovie/ Facebook：https://www.facebook.com/werwulfmovie Twitter：https://x.com/werwulfmovie 订阅 Focus Features：http://bit.ly/FocusFeaturesYouTube 成为 Focus Insider：https://insider.focusfeatures.com 网站：https://www.focusfeatures.com Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/focusfeatures脸书：https://www.facebook.com/focusfeatures 推特：https://twitter.com/focusfeatures
